---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible defect
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
---

## Summary

Describe the bug in 1-3 sentences.

## Reproduction

1. Provide a minimal reproducible script or snippet.
2. Include exact commands run.
3. Include expected and actual output.

## Environment

- retrievalx version:
- Python version:
- Rust version (if building locally):
- OS / architecture:

## Impact

- [ ] Incorrect ranking/quality regression
- [ ] Performance regression
- [ ] Build/packaging failure
- [ ] API compatibility regression
- [ ] Crash/panic

## Additional context

Include benchmark deltas, logs, or traces where relevant.
